// List 0 - Original vocabulary (food, travel, basic phrases)
export const vocabDict = {
  'buongiorno': 'good morning',
  'zucchine': 'zucchini',

  'carne': 'meat',
  'chiesa': 'church',
  'dolce': 'dessert',
  'arrivederci': 'goodbye (informal)',
  'teatro': 'theater',
  'latte macchiato': 'milk with a few drops of coffee',
  'contorno': 'side dish',
  'bicchiere': 'drinking glass',
  'cornetto con la crema': 'cream-filled croissant',
  'ciao': 'hello/goodbye (informal)',
  'arancia': 'orange',
  'birra': 'beer',
  'verdura': 'vegetable',

  'frutta': 'fruit',
  'cassa': 'cash register',
  'Quant\' e?': 'How much is it?',
  'uva': 'grape',

};

// List 1 - Classroom and conversation vocabulary
export const vocabDict1 = {
  'sedia': 'chair',
  'finestra': 'window',
  'insegnante': 'teacher',
  'libro': 'book',
  'penna': 'pen',
  'lavagna': 'blackboard/whiteboard',
  'porta': 'door',
  'tavolo': 'table',
  'signora': 'madam',
  'signore': 'sir',
  'professore': 'professor (m)',
  'professoressa': 'professor (f)',
  'nome': 'first name',
  'cognome': 'last name',
  'parola': 'word',
  'banca': 'bank',
  'macchina': 'car',
  'chiesa': 'church',
  'bicicletta': 'bike',
  'chiave': 'key',
  'essere': 'to be',
  'studiare': 'to study',
  'abitare': 'to live',
  'lavorare': 'to work',
  'parlare': 'to speak, to talk',
  'visitare': 'to visit',
  'ascoltare': 'to listen to',
  'Scusa...': 'excuse me',
  'Come ti chiami?': 'What is your name?',
  'Piacere.': 'Nice to meet you.',
  'Mi chiamo...': 'My name is...',
  'Come si scrive?': 'How do you spell it?',
  'Puoi ripetere?': 'Can you repeat?',
  'Come si pronuncia?': 'How do you pronounce it?',
  'Che cosa significa?': 'What does it mean?',
  'Di dove sei?': 'Where are you from?',
  'Io sono italiano/a.': 'I am Italian.',
  'Come si dice?': 'How do you say it?',
  'Studio in Italia.': 'I study in Italy.',
  'Dove abiti?': 'Where do you live?',
  'Che cosa studi?': 'What do you study?',
  'Dove lavori?': 'Where do you work?',
  'Abito in centro.': 'I live downtown/in the center',
  'Qual è il tuo numero di telefono?': 'What is your phone number?',
  'Qual è tuo indirizzo?': 'What is your address?',
  'Hai un\'e-mail?': 'Do you have an e-mail address?',
  'A presto!': 'See you soon!',
  'A domani!': 'See you tomorrow!',
  'zero': '0',
  'uno': '1',
  'due': '2',
  'tre': '3',
  'quattro': '4',
  'cinque': '5',
  'sei': '6',
  'sette': '7',
  'otto': '8',
  'nove': '9',
  'dieci': '10',
  'undici': '11',
  'dodici': '12',
  'tredici': '13',
  'quattordici': '14',
  'quindici': '15',
  'sedici': '16',
  'diciassette': '17',
  'diciotto': '18',
  'diciannove': '19',
  'venti': '20',
  'argentino/a': 'Argentina',
  'australiano/a': 'Australian',
  'brasiliano/a': 'Brazilian',
  'canadese': 'Canadian',
  'cinese': 'Chinese',
  'francese': 'Francia',
  'tedesco/a': 'German',
  'indiano/a': 'Indian',
  'inglese': 'English (Inghilterra)',
  'irlandese': 'Irish',
  'italiano/a': 'Italian',
  'messicano/a': 'Mexican',
  'spagnolo/a': 'Spagna',
  'americano/a, statunitense': 'American (Stati Uniti)'
};

// Vocabulary lists collection
export const vocabularyLists = {
  'List 0': vocabDict,
  'List 1': vocabDict1
};

// Get vocabulary pairs from a specific list
export const getVocabPairs = listName => {
  const dict = vocabularyLists[listName] || vocabDict;
  return Object.entries(dict).map(([italian, english]) => ({
    italian,
    english
  }));
};

// Create reverse mapping for English to Italian
export const reverseVocabDict = Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(vocabDict).map(([italian, english]) => [english, italian]));

// Get all vocabulary pairs (backward compatibility)
export const getAllVocabPairs = () => {
  return Object.entries(vocabDict).map(([italian, english]) => ({
    italian,
    english
  }));
};

// Get list of available vocabulary lists
export const getAvailableLists = () => {
  return Object.keys(vocabularyLists);
};

// Shuffle array utility
export const shuffleArray = array => {
  const shuffled = [...array];
  for (let i = shuffled.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
    const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
    [shuffled[i], shuffled[j]] = [shuffled[j], shuffled[i]];
  }
  return shuffled;
};

// Italian-English Vocabulary Dictionary
// Converted from vocab_dict.py

// List 0 - Original vocabulary (food, travel, basic phrases)
export const vocabDict = {
    'buongiorno': 'good morning',
    'zucchine': 'zucchini',
    'fontane': 'fountain',
    'insalata': 'salad',
    'Il conto, per favore!': 'The bill, please!',
    'piazza': 'square',
    'coltello': 'knife',
    'pera': 'pear',
    'vino bianco': 'white wine',
    'carciofo': 'artichoke',
    'pomodori': 'tomato',
    'vicolo': 'alley',
    'melanzane': 'eggplant',
    'pepe': 'pepper',
    'cameriere': 'waiter',
    'senta, scusi': 'listen, excuse me',
    'cipolla': 'onion',
    'buonanotte': 'good night',
    'cornetto al cioccolato': 'chocolate croissant',
    'torre': 'tower',
    'Scusi, dov\' e la fermata della metropolitan/del tram/del bus?': 'Excuse me, where is the subway/tram/bus stop?',
    'pane': 'bread',
    'patate': 'potato',
    'mura romane': 'roman walls/murals',

    'Che (cosa) significa ___?': 'What\'s the meaning of ___?',
    'Come se dice "___" in italiano?': 'How do you say "___" in Italian?',
    'Come si scrive ___?': 'How do write ___?',
    'Può ripetere, per favore?': 'Can you repeat, please?',
    'Non lo so': 'I don\'t know',
    'caffè': 'coffee',
    'palazzo': 'palace/building',
    'Vorrei un cappuccino, per favore!': 'I would like a cappuccino please!',
    'mele': 'apples',
    'salve': 'hello (formal)',
    'museo': 'museum',

    'contorno': 'side dish',
    'bicchiere': 'drinking glass',
    'cornetto con la crema': 'cream-filled croissant',
    'ciao': 'hello/goodbye (informal)',
    'arancia': 'orange',
    'birra': 'beer',
    'verdura': 'vegetable',
    'tavolo': 'table',
    'frutta': 'fruit',
    'cassa': 'cash register',
    'Quant\' e?': 'How much is it?',
    'uva': 'grape',
    'tè': 'tea'
};

// List 1 - Classroom and conversation vocabulary
export const vocabDict1 = {
    'sedia': 'chair',
    'finestra': 'window',
    'insegnante': 'teacher',
    'libro': 'book',
    'penna': 'pen',
    'lavagna': 'blackboard/whiteboard',
    'porta': 'door',
    'tavolo': 'table',
    'signora': 'madam',
    'signore': 'sir',
    'professore': 'professor (m)',
    'professoressa': 'professor (f)',
    'nome': 'first name',
    'cognome': 'last name',
    'parola': 'word',
    'banca': 'bank',
    'macchina': 'car',
    'chiesa': 'church',
    'bicicletta': 'bike',
    'chiave': 'key',
    'essere': 'to be',
    'studiare': 'to study',
    'abitare': 'to live',
    'lavorare': 'to work',
    'parlare': 'to speak, to talk',
    'visitare': 'to visit',
    'ascoltare': 'to listen to',
    'Scusa...': 'excuse me',
    'Come ti chiami?': 'What is your name?',
    'Piacere.': 'Nice to meet you.',
    'Mi chiamo...': 'My name is...',
    'Come si scrive?': 'How do you spell it?',
    'Puoi ripetere?': 'Can you repeat?',
    'Come si pronuncia?': 'How do you pronounce it?',
    'Che cosa significa?': 'What does it mean?',
    'Di dove sei?': 'Where are you from?',
    'Io sono italiano/a.': 'I am Italian.',
    'Come si dice?': 'How do you say it?',
    'Studio in Italia.': 'I study in Italy.',
    'Dove abiti?': 'Where do you live?',
    'Che cosa studi?': 'What do you study?',
    'Dove lavori?': 'Where do you work?',
    'Abito in centro.': 'I live downtown/in the center',
    'Qual è il tuo numero di telefono?': 'What is your phone number?',
    'Qual è tuo indirizzo?': 'What is your address?',
    'Hai un\'e-mail?': 'Do you have an e-mail address?',
    'A presto!': 'See you soon!',
    'A domani!': 'See you tomorrow!',
    'zero': '0',
    'uno': '1',
    'due': '2',
    'tre': '3',
    'quattro': '4',
    'cinque': '5',
    'sei': '6',
    'sette': '7',
    'otto': '8',
    'nove': '9',
    'dieci': '10',
    'undici': '11',
    'dodici': '12',
    'tredici': '13',
    'quattordici': '14',
    'quindici': '15',
    'sedici': '16',
    'diciassette': '17',
    'diciotto': '18',
    'diciannove': '19',
    'venti': '20',
    'argentino/a': 'Argentina',
    'australiano/a': 'Australian',

    'canadese': 'Canadian',
    'cinese': 'Chinese',
    'francese': 'Francia',
    'tedesco/a': 'German',
    'indiano/a': 'Indian',
    'inglese': 'English (Inghilterra)',
    'irlandese': 'Irish',
    'italiano/a': 'Italian',
    'messicano/a': 'Mexican',
    'spagnolo/a': 'Spagna',
    'americano/a, statunitense': 'American (Stati Uniti)'
};

// Vocabulary lists collection
export const vocabularyLists = {
    'List 0': vocabDict,
    'List 1': vocabDict1
};

// Get vocabulary pairs from a specific list
export const getVocabPairs = (listName) => {
    const dict = vocabularyLists[listName] || vocabDict;
    return Object.entries(dict).map(([italian, english]) => ({
        italian,
        english
    }));
};

// Create reverse mapping for English to Italian
export const reverseVocabDict = Object.fromEntries(
    Object.entries(vocabDict).map(([italian, english]) => [english, italian])
);

// Get all vocabulary pairs (backward compatibility)
export const getAllVocabPairs = () => {
    return Object.entries(vocabDict).map(([italian, english]) => ({
        italian,
        english
    }));
};

// Get list of available vocabulary lists
export const getAvailableLists = () => {
    return Object.keys(vocabularyLists);
};

// Shuffle array utility
export const shuffleArray = (array) => {
    const shuffled = [...array];
    for (let i = shuffled.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
        const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
        [shuffled[i], shuffled[j]] = [shuffled[j], shuffled[i]];
    }
    return shuffled;
};
